template:
**DOCUMENT FORMAT — LETTER TO OPPOSING COUNSEL**:
Professional attorney-to-attorney correspondence (1-2 pages max).
DO NOT generate a title header. Start with date and recipient address.
DO NOT use Roman numerals or numbered section headers.

STRUCTURE:
1. Date (or recipient address if letterhead has date)
2. Recipient: attorney name, firm name, address
3. "Re:" line — Case name, court, docket number
4. "Dear [Attorney Name]:" — use actual name
5. Body: 2-4 paragraphs, direct and professional
6. Closing: "Very truly yours," or "Sincerely,"

TONE: Professional, firm, direct. Attorney-to-attorney, not attorney-to-client.
hints: Key elements to address: case reference, specific requests or proposals, deadlines, professional tone. Attorney-to-attorney correspondence.
